name: Twenty CRM
description: Twenty is a modern, open-source CRM platform that gives you full control of your customer relationship data. It offers a clean interface inspired by Notion and Figma, with powerful features like pipeline management, contact tracking, task automation, and API-first extensibility.
short_desc: Open-source CRM. Modern alternative to Salesforce
author: Twenty

form_fields.label: Server URL
form_fields.hint: Full URL to access Twenty (e.g., https://twenty.example.com). Required — must match the domain you use in the browser.
